name: Counter-Narrative
description: A tactic used to counter false or misleading information by providing factual and accurate information to counter the narrative.
when_to_apply: When false or misleading information is being spread
example: Providing factual information to counter a false news story

name: Media Literacy
description: A tactic used to educate people on how to critically evaluate information and identify potential biases or misinformation.
when_to_apply: In situations where misinformation is prevalent
example: Teaching people how to fact-check information
